ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "host_university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host university */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position (e.g., Crew, Single Scull) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (e.g., Regatta, Trophy) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_host_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the university */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the university */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Color of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the coach is associated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the athlete is associated with */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the athlete (e.g., Stroke, Bow) */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the athlete */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the team registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participation (e.g., Registered, Confirmed, Withdrawn) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "place_finish" TEXT /* Place finish of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division (e.g., A Div, B Div) */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Race time of the team */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Regatta, Trophy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Crew, Single Scull) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., A Div, B Div) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the user is associated with */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view event, update team) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the team or athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analytics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analytics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message being sent */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the team registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Registered, Confirmed, Withdrawn) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_registration_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_registration_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
